## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between Branca (Attio) and Marcel (GrowthX) to explore potential collaboration on AI-driven content marketing strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/nm4GNHTbUq5ZAJoU4HYHdyxFXwfQUniZ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers AI-powered content marketing services with human expertise, specializing in editorial and programmatic SEO](https://fathom.video/share/nm4GNHTbUq5ZAJoU4HYHdyxFXwfQUniZ?tab=summary&timestamp=158.0)
  - [Branca, new VP of Marketing at Attio, seeks fast implementation of AI-driven marketing strategies](https://fathom.video/share/nm4GNHTbUq5ZAJoU4HYHdyxFXwfQUniZ?tab=summary&timestamp=365.0)
  - [Both parties expressed strong mutual interest in collaboration, scheduling a follow-up meeting](https://fathom.video/share/nm4GNHTbUq5ZAJoU4HYHdyxFXwfQUniZ?tab=summary&timestamp=528.0)
  - [GrowthX's services align well with Attio's needs for rapid, AI-enhanced content production and SEO optimization](https://fathom.video/share/nm4GNHTbUq5ZAJoU4HYHdyxFXwfQUniZ?tab=summary&timestamp=528.0)

## Topics

### Company Backgrounds and Leadership Experience

  - [Marcel (GrowthX): Built successful content marketing programs at IBM, HP, and startups; founded GrowthX in 2023](https://fathom.video/share/nm4GNHTbUq5ZAJoU4HYHdyxFXwfQUniZ?tab=summary&timestamp=165.0)
  - [Branca (Attio): Mechanical engineer background; experience in consulting (BCG, KKR) and tech marketing (Zenefits, GoDaddy, Glide)](https://fathom.video/share/nm4GNHTbUq5ZAJoU4HYHdyxFXwfQUniZ?tab=summary&timestamp=412.0)
  - [Both have track records of driving significant growth through content and SEO strategies](https://fathom.video/share/nm4GNHTbUq5ZAJoU4HYHdyxFXwfQUniZ?tab=summary&timestamp=475.0)

### GrowthX's AI-Powered Content Marketing Approach

  - [Combines AI workflows with human expertise (editors, subject matter experts)](https://fathom.video/share/nm4GNHTbUq5ZAJoU4HYHdyxFXwfQUniZ?tab=summary&timestamp=821.0)
  - [Services include editorial content (50-100k words/month) and programmatic SEO](https://fathom.video/share/nm4GNHTbUq5ZAJoU4HYHdyxFXwfQUniZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1335.0)
  - [Uses advanced AI agents to build scalable content workflows](https://fathom.video/share/nm4GNHTbUq5ZAJoU4HYHdyxFXwfQUniZ?tab=summary&timestamp=969.0)
  - [Incorporates deep research, multi-source citation, and vector database storage for content generation](https://fathom.video/share/nm4GNHTbUq5ZAJoU4HYHdyxFXwfQUniZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1018.0)

### Attio's Current Marketing Needs

  - [Branca recently joined Attio (2 weeks ago) as VP of Marketing](https://fathom.video/share/nm4GNHTbUq5ZAJoU4HYHdyxFXwfQUniZ?tab=summary&timestamp=365.0)
  - [Seeking fast implementation of AI-driven marketing strategies](https://fathom.video/share/nm4GNHTbUq5ZAJoU4HYHdyxFXwfQUniZ?tab=summary&timestamp=365.0)
  - [Previous success with LLM optimization and ChatGPT-driven content at Glide](https://fathom.video/share/nm4GNHTbUq5ZAJoU4HYHdyxFXwfQUniZ?tab=summary&timestamp=603.0)
  - [Limited current team at Attio; needs external support for rapid execution](https://fathom.video/share/nm4GNHTbUq5ZAJoU4HYHdyxFXwfQUniZ?tab=summary&timestamp=640.0)

### Potential Collaboration Areas

  - [Editorial content production (starting point: 50k words/month)](https://fathom.video/share/nm4GNHTbUq5ZAJoU4HYHdyxFXwfQUniZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1335.0)
  - [Programmatic SEO opportunities (e.g., category pages, comparison pages)](https://fathom.video/share/nm4GNHTbUq5ZAJoU4HYHdyxFXwfQUniZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1161.0)
  - [AI-optimized content for search and AI assistants](https://fathom.video/share/nm4GNHTbUq5ZAJoU4HYHdyxFXwfQUniZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1106.0)
  - [Possible expansion into custom AI applications (similar to GrowthX's work with other clients)](https://fathom.video/share/nm4GNHTbUq5ZAJoU4HYHdyxFXwfQUniZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1229.0)

### GrowthX's Working Model and Pricing

  - [Work stream-based approach: Editorial (starting $9k/month) and Programmatic SEO (starting $12k/month)](https://fathom.video/share/nm4GNHTbUq5ZAJoU4HYHdyxFXwfQUniZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1347.0)
  - [Includes managing director, AI workflows, tooling, weekly meetings, and daily Slack updates](https://fathom.video/share/nm4GNHTbUq5ZAJoU4HYHdyxFXwfQUniZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1397.0)
  - [Flexible to accommodate specific client needs (e.g., medical review for HIMS & HERS)](https://fathom.video/share/nm4GNHTbUq5ZAJoU4HYHdyxFXwfQUniZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1359.0)
  - [Typically starts with a pilot period before defaulting to a 12-month contract](https://fathom.video/share/nm4GNHTbUq5ZAJoU4HYHdyxFXwfQUniZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1514.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Follow-up meeting scheduled for Friday to dive deeper into potential collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/nm4GNHTbUq5ZAJoU4HYHdyxFXwfQUniZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1528.0)
  - [Marcel to send sample proposal and additional thoughts via email](https://fathom.video/share/nm4GNHTbUq5ZAJoU4HYHdyxFXwfQUniZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1505.0)
  - [GrowthX to add Branca to a shared Slack channel for quick interaction](https://fathom.video/share/nm4GNHTbUq5ZAJoU4HYHdyxFXwfQUniZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [Explore specific programmatic SEO opportunities for Attio](https://fathom.video/share/nm4GNHTbUq5ZAJoU4HYHdyxFXwfQUniZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1401.0)
  - [Consider potential start date (GrowthX currently booked through end of April)](https://fathom.video/share/nm4GNHTbUq5ZAJoU4HYHdyxFXwfQUniZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1496.0)
